ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the stock is listed (e.g., S&P 500, DJIA) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the stock operates */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector within the industry */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share (latest) */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value indicating volatility */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings" (
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earning event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the earning event belongs to */,
  "earnings_date" TEXT /* Date of the earning event */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) */,
  "prev_close" REAL /* Previous closing price of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in stock price since the previous close */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue reported in the earnings */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income reported in the earnings */,
  "eps_estimate" REAL /* Estimated EPS by analysts */,
  "revenue_estimate" REAL /* Estimated revenue by analysts */,
  "surprise" REAL /* Difference between actual and estimated EPS */,
  "surprise_percentage" REAL /* Percentage surprise */,
  "call_transcript" TEXT /* URL or text of the earnings call transcript */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price record belongs to */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  "price_change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the dashboard belongs to */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_config" TEXT /* Configuration of the dashboard (e.g., layout, widgets) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dashboard is the default for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dashboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., earnings, price movement, trading volume) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was created */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was resolved (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
